name: Karakeep
compose:
name: slashnode-karakeep
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/karakeep-app/karakeep:0.32.0
    container_name: karakeep-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - chrome
      - meilisearch
    environment:
      MEILI_ADDR: http://karakeep-meilisearch:7700
      MEILI_MASTER_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      BROWSER_WEB_URL: http://karakeep-chrome:9222
      DATA_DIR: /data
      NEXTAUTH_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      NEXTAUTH_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8620
      KARAKEEP_VERSION: release
    volumes:
      - web_data-karakeep_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8620:3000
  chrome:
    image: zenika/alpine-chrome:124
    container_name: karakeep-chrome
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - '--no-sandbox'
      - '--disable-gpu'
      - '--disable-dev-shm-usage'
      - '--remote-debugging-address=0.0.0.0'
      - '--remote-debugging-port=9222'
      - '--hide-scrollbars'
  meilisearch:
    image: getmeili/meilisearch:v1.41.0
    container_name: karakeep-meilisearch
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MEILI_NO_ANALYTICS: 'true'
      MEILI_MASTER_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - meilisearch_data-meilisearch_data:/meili_data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-karakeep_data:
    name: slashnode-karakeep_web_data-karakeep_data
  meilisearch_data-meilisearch_data:
    name: slashnode-karakeep_meilisearch_data-meilisearch_data
